name: Velour Poly
explanation: A warm, velvety velocity-sensitive DCO polyphonic synthesizer with up to eight voices. Each voice runs two digitally-clocked oscillators — a band-limited saw and a band-limited pulse — with gentle cross-modulation for a slightly hollow, glassy character, into a smooth resonant low-pass driven by its own envelope (Cutoff + Env Amount); an amplitude envelope and brightness track key velocity, and a stereo chorus widens it into a lush 80s pad. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Cross-Mod, Chorus, Attack, Release and Level.
